\tzpentry{ID4965}{Magnetic Helicity Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4965 introduces Magnetic Helicity Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\\mathcal{M}{[}\\rho{]} = \\sum\\_k M\\_k \\rho M\\_k\\^{}\\dagger - \\rhoM{[}$
\]
